mapper.select: SELECT id, name, email, password, phone_number, role, created_at, updated_at FROM users ORDER BY id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users (name, email, password, phone_number, role) VALUES (#{name}, #{email}, #{password}, #{phoneNumber}, #{role})
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET name = #{name}, email = #{email}, password = #{password}, phone_number = #{phoneNumber}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
